title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at EY India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at EY India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
EY India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Varanasi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About EY India:
EY India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EY India!
